models.name: Kimi For Coding
models.tooltip: Kimi For Coding - Professional programming model launched by Moonshot AI, providing powerful code generation and understanding capabilities

models.name: Kimi-K2.5
models.tooltip: Kimi K2.5 is Kimi's most intelligent and versatile model to date, with native multimodal architecture design, simultaneously supporting text, image and video input, thinking and non-thinking modes, conversation and Agent tasks.

models.name: Kimi-K2.6
models.tooltip: Kimi K2.6 is Kimi's latest and most intelligent model, with stronger and more stable long-range code writing capabilities, significantly improved instruction following and self-correction abilities, simultaneously supporting text, image and video input, thinking and non-thinking modes, conversation and Agent tasks.
